name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
benefit: Free LPG connection + first refill free + stove subsidy
benefit_hindi: Free LPG connection, pehla cylinder free, aur chulha khareedne mein madad

eligibility.description_hindi: BPL parivaar ki 18 saal se upar ki mahilaayein
criteria: Must be an adult woman (18+ years)
Family must be BPL (Below Poverty Line)
No existing LPG connection in the household
Name in SECC 2011 list or belongs to SC/ST/Antyodaya/PMAY/forest dweller category
exclusions: Households that already have LPG connection
Male applicants (connection must be in woman's name)

documents_required: BPL card or SECC inclusion proof

steps: Visit nearest LPG distributor (HP, Bharat, Indane)
Submit Aadhaar, BPL certificate, and bank details
steps_hindi: Nearest gas agency (HP, Bharat, Indane) jaayein
Aadhaar, BPL card, aur bank passbook dein
7-15 din mein free LPG connection mil jayega

hindi_summary: Ujjwala Yojana mein garib ghar ki mahilaon ko free LPG gas connection milta hai. Pehla cylinder bhi free hai. Iske liye BPL card aur Aadhaar chahiye. Nearest gas agency mein jaake apply kar sakte hain. Helpline: 1906.
